# OpenTelemetry click Instrumentation

{{ pypi }}

This library allows tracing requests made by the click library.

## Installation

```
pip install opentelemetry-instrumentation-click
```

## References

- [OpenTelemetry click/ Tracing](https://opentelemetry-python-contrib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/instrumentation/click/click.html)
- [OpenTelemetry Project](https://opentelemetry.io/)

modules.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.click
documentation:
Instrument [click] CLI applications.

# Usage

```python
import click
from opentelemetry.instrumentation.click import ClickInstrumentor

ClickInstrumentor().instrument()

@click.command()
def hello():
   click.echo(f'Hello world!')

if __name__ == "__main__":
    hello()
```

# API

[click]: https://pypi.org/project/click/
